final:
module top_module(
    input signed [15:0] in,
    output reg [15:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if (in < 0) begin
            out = ~in + 1;
        end else begin
            out = in;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out = in; if (in >= 0) begin out = ~in + 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out = in; if (in >= 0) begin out = ~in + 1; end
